name: Video-Demo-Requests-V1.docx
content:
Can I see a video demonstration of C.E. King machines before purchasing?

Yes. C.E. King has video demonstrations available for many of its machines. Videos can be viewed on the C.E. King YouTube channel or requested directly from the sales team for specific models.

Details

  • The C.E. King YouTube channel features demonstration videos of key products including the Dispenser RX, Technocount range, and Technofill fillers
  • Product pages on ceking.com may include embedded video demonstrations
  • If you would like a video of a specific machine or configuration, email sales@ceking.com with your request
  • For bespoke demonstrations (e.g., testing with your specific product), contact the sales team to discuss a trial or sample run
  • Some customers request video calls to see machines in operation — the sales team can arrange live video demonstrations
  • Videos showing machine operation, changeover, and cleaning procedures may be available for current production models
  • If you are comparing models, ask the sales team for comparison videos or side-by-side demonstrations

Useful link:

Contact C.E. King to request a video demonstration
